answers.text: 当前围绕选中的 Balance Heater (heater-4) 及其进出口流股 (feed-13, product-13) 生成候选编辑提案。诊断显示两个 error 级别问题：Cold Feed 缺少流量规格、Balance Heater 缺少出口温度控制目标参数；另有一个 warning 级别问题：Heater Outlet 的出口温度效应尚未确认，但该 warning 依赖于前两个 error 的修复结果，因此优先处理两个 error。

proposed_actions.title: 为 Cold Feed 补全流量规格占位符
proposed_actions.rationale: 诊断 STREAM_SPEC_MISSING 指出 feed-13 缺少 flow rate。补充 flow_rate_kgph 占位符，使用户可填入实际值后解除该 error。此为规格补全操作，不改变拓扑。

proposed_actions.title: 为 Balance Heater 补全出口温度控制目标参数
proposed_actions.rationale: 诊断 UNIT_PARAMETER_INCOMPLETE 指出 heater-4 处于 outlet_temperature 控制模式但缺少目标温度参数。补充 outlet_temperature_target_c 占位符，使用户可填入控制目标值后解除该 error。此为参数补全操作，不改变拓扑或控制模式。

issues.message: Cold Feed is missing flow rate specification.
Balance Heater is configured for outlet temperature control but outlet temperature target is missing.
Heater Outlet temperature pattern may still be influenced by missing inlet conditions, and the local outlet effect is not yet confirmed.

citations.label: 诊断 STREAM_SPEC_MISSING
citations.excerpt: Cold Feed is missing flow rate specification.

citations.label: 诊断 UNIT_PARAMETER_INCOMPLETE
citations.excerpt: Balance Heater is configured for outlet temperature control but outlet temperature target is missing.

citations.label: 诊断 HEATER_OUTLET_EFFECT_UNCONFIRMED
citations.excerpt: Heater Outlet temperature pattern may still be influenced by missing inlet conditions, and the local outlet effect is not yet confirmed.
